description_long: This object is a compact, break-action shotgun with a short, curved wooden grip and a black metal barrel assembly. The barrel is double-barreled, arranged side-by-side, with both barrels capped by red shells visible at the muzzle. The receiver and trigger guard are made of dark metal, and the trigger guard is rounded and slightly elongated. Two red shotgun shells with brass bases are placed nearby, suggesting the weapon is either being loaded or unloaded. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on portability and ease of handling, making it suitable for close-quarters use in urban environments.
description: A compact, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a curved wooden grip, black metal receiver, and two red shells at the muzzle. Two additional red shotgun shells with brass bases are placed beside it.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin red-capped barrels and the ends of the shotgun shells, with the wooden grip and trigger guard partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved wooden grip, black metal receiver, and the break-action hinge, with two red shells standing upright nearby.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden grip and the top of the receiver, with the barrels pointing away and the shells to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the wooden grip, the black metal receiver, and the two red shells lying on the ground.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, elongated trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
